'''Ord Torrenze''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Sertar sector/Legends|Sertar sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].

==History==
During the last decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]], the planet was liberated from an invasion force. The Republic [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[FarStar|''Freedom's Messenger'']] led the liberation fleet at the [[Battle of Ord Torrenze]].

In the early period of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War,]] the planet became the site of a battle later known as the [[Debacle on Ord Torrenze]].<ref name="IH">''[[Star Wars: Imperial Handbook: A Commander's Guide]]''</ref>
